name: looper
description: Write and clean beads, orchestrate GPT-5.6 work, and research software decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Write and clean beads, research decisions, run loops.
interface.longDescription: Looper writes compact GPT-5.6-aware Codex orchestration loops over accepted specs, validated childbeads, measured implementor/reviewer routing, and proof. Beadwriter is the Looper-native alternative to lightweight to-tickets output when commit, validation, dependency, stop, and runtime metadata are required. Bead Cleaner safely prunes bd backlogs, and Phone-A-SWE researches software decisions. System Mapper is deprecated for now. Installed helper skills are optional accelerators, never hard blockers.
defaultPrompt: Use Looper to write a Codex loop.
Use Beadwriter to decompose this bead.
Use Bead Cleaner to audit and safely prune open beads.
Turn this plan into implementation slices.
Write a loop using Matt Pocock skill lanes.
Use Phone-A-SWE to research this technical decision.
